sourceSummary.oneLine: Bill of materials and part lists for Retrofit Detector models G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, and G1417FWP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF BOM source for identifying detector assemblies, ERP codes, parts, specifications, suppliers, quantities, and required or optional accessories.
keyPoints: Each detector section is labeled Retrofit Detector and CsI Type.
The detector models include G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, and G1417FWP.
The BOM includes detector assemblies, required accessories, optional accessories, labels, packing items, battery, VE Gender cable, cable, VE adaptor, cradle, and CIB items.
Most detector sections show approval-related dates of 2025-10-21.
A separate BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy (7.0m) part list shows a date of 2025-7-15.

evidence.claim: The detector sections show approval-related dates of 2025-10-21.
The BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy (7.0m) section shows approval-related dates of 2025-7-15.
The source path identifies the file as BLUE_BOM_Rev.0_2025.10.21.xlsx.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal metadata is only 'general'.
The source path indicates Rev.0, while page footer-like entries include both 704-9 (REV.01) and 704-9 (REV.00); revision meaning is ambiguous.
Most detector sections show 2025-10-21, but the BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy (7.0m) section shows 2025-7-15.
The text is CSV-like extraction from an XLSX BOM and includes some malformed or inconsistent rows, spacing, and repeated accessory headings.
No standards are identified in the source text.
